StopRule: Frozen pre-2021 buy residual-risk discovery. Center positive and >=98% control in both eras; continuous net >=control +4%; CAGR >=control +0.06 point; PF/recovery/return-DD >=97% control; DD <=min(1.20%, control +0.10 point); trades equal control. At least 3 of 4 lower enabled rungs retain 98% of both eras, improve net >=2%, retain 97% efficiency, meet the same DD ceiling, and preserve trades. No post-result rescue.
